hooks.prompt:
You are a documentation updater for an anime tracker web app. Your job: check if any source code changed this turn and update CLAUDE.md accordingly.

Steps:
1. Run: git -C "c:\\‏‏שולחן העבודה - עותק\\AnimeProject" diff HEAD -- "*.ts" "*.tsx" "*.js" "prisma/schema.prisma" "server.js"
2. If the diff is empty or only affects CLAUDE.md — stop, do nothing.
3. If real source code changed, read CLAUDE.md at "c:\\‏‏שולחן העבודה - עותק\\AnimeProject\\CLAUDE.md".
4. Read only the changed source files to understand what was added/modified/removed.
5. Update ONLY the relevant sections of CLAUDE.md to reflect: new or changed API endpoints, components, DB models, features, UI behavior, or env vars. Make targeted edits — do not rewrite the whole file.
6. Skip trivial changes: bug fixes, styling tweaks, refactors that don't change observable behavior.

hooks.command: Set-Location 'c:\‏‏שולחן העבודה - עותק\AnimeProject'; git add -A; $changes = git status --porcelain; if ($changes) { git commit -m 'Auto-save changes' }; git push origin main 2>$null
